comment: I'm going to have to stop using this app if the android version doesn't get dark mode. The home and ce ter buttons are bright they are literally being burned into my screen. I can see the shadows of them, the search icon, and the live icon for hours afterwards on my phone. It's 2023, there is absolutely no reason for there not be a dark mode for this app by now. At the very least dim the icons, they should be the brightest white you can possible get
